column4: Issue
hero-photo-4.png is referenced in officersData.js but does not exist — will show broken image
Jasnoor Chimni and Sophia Tounalom have role: 'officer' — needs a real title
Fay Tong is missing LinkedIn URL, year, and focus area
All 4 committee cards have image blank — no photos for any committee
All 10 event cards have no photos
Become a podcast guest button links to /contact which does not exist as a page
4 winner cards have link # — no real links to winning projects
6 past sponsors missing logos: ASUW, AT&T, GPSS, The HUB, PwC, Student Activities Office
Several officers missing hometown and fun fact fields
Hana Kang missing year and hometown
Sign up for early priority notifications email form has no backend — submissions go nowhere
Newsletter spotlight / podcast guest / collaboration cards have no linked forms or CTAs
No meta description tag
No Open Graph tags (og:title / og:description / og:image) — links wont preview on social media
No Twitter Card meta tags
Currently a generic favicon.svg — should be replaced with the WINFO logo
Run npm run build and verify there are no errors before deploying
Decide on deployment platform (Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, etc.)
Set up a custom domain (e.g. uwwinfo.org)
Confirm the base path is correct for the chosen deployment target
All 11 podcast episode links updated to YouTube channel
Hero watch here CTA link updated to YouTube
Watch here button size fixed
Photo grid styling fixed (equal height + rounded corners)
All social links populated (Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Email)
Membership signup URL centralized in externalLinks.js
